content: I'm planning a wedding for a client and I'm looking for some inspiration for the decor and theme. I've been reading a lot of wedding blogs and magazines.
That sounds like a fun project! What's the theme or style of the wedding that you're planning?

The couple is thinking of a beach-themed wedding, and I've been looking for ideas on how to incorporate that into the decor and overall aesthetic. I've been enjoying knitting in my free time and I've been making some wedding favors for the couple.
A beach-themed wedding sounds beautiful! Knitting is such a great hobby, and making wedding favors is a thoughtful touch. What kind of knitting projects have you been working on lately?
I've been making some scarves and hats, and I've also been experimenting with different yarns and textures. I'm a big fan of surfing and I've been trying to get out to the beach as much as possible.
That sounds like a great way to relax and unwind. Surfing is such a great way to stay active and connected to nature. Have you traveled to any new surf spots recently?

I've been to some great surf spots in California and Hawaii, and I'm planning a trip to Australia next year. I'm also working on an online course and I'm excited to share it with my clients and followers.
That sounds like an exciting project! Creating an online course can be a lot of work, but it's a great way to share your expertise and connect with others. What's the topic of your online course?
It's a course on wedding planning and decor, and I'm planning to launch it in the next few months. I'm a bit nervous but I'm excited to share my knowledge and experience with others.
That's great to hear! I'm sure your course will be a hit. Do you have any favorite wedding planning books or resources that you recommend to your clients?

I've been recommending 'The Wedding Planner' by Mindy Weiss and I've also been enjoying 'The Knot' wedding planning website. I'm a big fan of travel blogging and I've been writing about my adventures on my blog.
Those are great resources! I'll have to look into them for future conversation topics. It was great chatting with you about wedding planning and decor.
